name: hcportal_addEditNewsflash
description: Creates or updates a portal newsflash. When @newsflashId is NULL a new row is inserted with the calling admin's hasherId recorded as CreatedByHasherId. When @newsflashId is provided the existing active (IsDeleted=0) newsflash is updated. Image upload to Azure Blob Storage is handled by the Flutter portal before calling this SP — @imageUrl receives the resulting blob URL. An empty or whitespace-only @imageUrl is treated as NULL (no image / clear existing image). Validation is fast-failed before the auth round-trip.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with NULL callerParamString.

parameters.name: newsflashId
parameters.description: NULL to add a new newsflash; provide an existing GUID to edit. On edit, the newsflash must exist and not be soft-deleted.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Required. Trimmed before storage. Validated for NULL/empty before auth.

parameters.name: bodyText
parameters.description: Required. Trimmed before storage. Validated for NULL/empty before auth.

parameters.name: imageUrl
parameters.description: Optional Azure Blob URL. NULL or empty string sets ImageUrl to NULL (no image / clears existing image).

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Required. The date from which the newsflash becomes active. Validated for NULL before auth.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Optional. If provided must be >= @startDate. NULL = no expiry.

parameters.name: kennelId
parameters.description: Optional. NULL = platform-wide newsflash shown to all users. When provided, the kennel must exist in HC.Kennel.

rowsets.name: SuccessEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any outcome — success, validation failure, auth failure, or runtime error.

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.description: NULL on success, error message on failure

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.PortalNewsflash SET Title, BodyText, ImageUrl, StartDate, EndDate, KennelId, UpdatedAt — when @newsflashId is provided
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change the empty-string-to-NULL normalisation for @imageUrl without coordinating with the portal client
